_about: Path-keyed descriptions for Claude XRay. Keys are relative to the root (~/.claude/ or <cwd>/.claude/). Use trailing slash for directories. Order doesn't matter; longest-match wins.
settings.json: User-level settings: model, permissions, hooks, env vars, plugins. Auto-backups kept as settings.json.backup-<timestamp> (last 5).
settings.local.json: Personal project overrides — gitignored, 0600 perms. Takes priority over .claude/settings.json (project) and ~/.claude/settings.json (user).
CLAUDE.md: Instructions loaded into every session. At ~/.claude/ this is global; inside a project it's project-specific. They layer.
CLAUDE.local.md: Personal project instructions — gitignored. Merged with CLAUDE.md.
projects/: Session transcripts. One subdirectory per unique working directory (slashes in the path replaced with dashes). Default 30-day retention via cleanupPeriodDays.
memory/: Auto-memory store (per-project subdirs). Survives across sessions when autoMemoryEnabled is true.
agents/: Subagent definitions. At ~/.claude/ they're user-scoped; under .claude/ they're project-scoped and shared via git.
commands/: Custom slash commands. User-scoped under ~/.claude/, project-scoped (and committed) under .claude/.
skills/: Custom skills, callable as /skill-name. Same scoping rules as agents/commands.
hooks/: Hook scripts referenced from settings.json. Executed on lifecycle events (PreToolUse, Stop, etc.).
ide/: VS Code extension lock files and ephemeral auth tokens (0600). Bridges the CLI and the IDE extension.
shell-snapshots/: Saved shell state for the Bash tool — lets it maintain state across calls.
backups/: General-purpose backup storage Claude Code uses internally.
cache/: Generic on-disk cache. Safe to delete; will be re-populated.
downloads/: Files Claude Code downloaded on your behalf (e.g. via WebFetch).
file-history/: Auto-saved snapshots of files Claude edited, used for diffing/undo across sessions.
image-cache/: Cached image content (e.g. screenshots and pasted images).
plans/: Saved Plan-mode plans and related state.
sessions/: Active/recent session metadata (separate from the projects/ transcripts).
tasks/: TaskCreate persistence — the task list survives across sessions.
mcp-needs-auth-cache.json: Tracks which MCP servers still need an OAuth flow completed.
.mcp.json: Project-scoped MCP server configuration. Overrides/extends the global ~/.claude.json for this repo.
.worktreeinclude: Files to copy into git worktrees created via `claude --worktree`.
settings.json.backup-: Timestamped auto-backup of settings.json. The five most recent are kept. Restore by copying back over settings.json.
projects/*.jsonl: Session transcript: line-delimited JSON. Each line is a message, tool use, or metadata event. Read-only by default in XRay.
